title: Monday doc as a file set as item default items
excerpt:
Hi! is there any idea to add monday doc as a default doc on item default values per item? 
thank you

posts.author: jonathan.mahardifa (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! is there any idea to add monday doc as a default doc on item default values per item?
thank you

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @jonathan.mahardifa! As you have noticed, workdocs are not currently supported when using item default values That said, I have followed up internally and can confirm the team is aware of the limitation and are planning to address this setback in the near future, however we are not able to confirm a specific timeline as of yet - thanks in advance
